description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 98.

Tier I: Living Rune

Runic Body. Ancient runes of power have drawn themselves across your skin, manifested by the primal power flowing through you. You gain resistance to one of the following damage types: acid, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, poison, radiant, or thunder. These resistances apply to alternative forms, such as the ones created by the Wild Shape class feature. Additionally, your unarmed strikes and natural weapon attacks become magical.

Runic Boon. You gain one of the following runic boons, which is always active.

Rune of the Heart: If you start your turn with less than half your total hit points, you regain 10 hit points. +

Rune of the Wind: You gain a fly speed of 50 feet. +

Rune of the Deep: You gain a swim speed equal to your walking speed, can breathe underwater, and have resistance to cold damage.

Rune of the Earth: You cannot be knocked prone or moved against your will. You gain resistance to bludgeoning damage.

Rune of the Flame: You become immune to fire damage. +

Rune of the Dead: You become immune to necrotic damage. +

Rune of the Void: You gain darkvision out to a range of 120 feet. This darkvision is not impeded by magical darkness. The first time you damage a creature in a round of combat, it must succeed on a DC 25 Constitution saving throw or be unable to regain hit points until the start of your next turn.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
